series_metadata.series_description: These records include original treatment documentation, rehabilitation plans, intake forms, progress notes, closure reports and correspondence with managed care organizations and documentation from case managers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in BWC storage facility for 5 years after discharge, microfilm, then destroy ; Microform: Retain microfilm for 20 years in off-site storage, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until audited by the auditor of State and the audit report is released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, or until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Burn ; Electronic: Delete
